title: Artificial Seawater Medium
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"clof7","text":"Modified from Harrison et al., 1980. A broad spectrum artifical seawater medium for coastal and open ocean phytoplankton. The final salt concentration is ~34 ppt.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"a0bpp","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"2msu8","text":"Prepare solutions separately, autoclave (or filter sterilize as needed), and then mix to prevent precipitation of salts. When autoclaving, use a bottle at least twice the size of the needed volume (e.g. use a 1 L bottle to autoclave 500 mL). Solutions should sit for 24-48 hr after autoclaving to allow for gaseous exchanges. N, P, Si, and trace element components are from the Bigelow NCMAM L1 medium; Vitamin components are from the Bigelow NCMAM f/2 medium. Trace metal and vitamin solutions can be made ahead of time and aliquots stored frozen.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"aucu4","text":"Acid washed all glassware with 10% HCl and rinse well (3-5 times with deionized or ultrapure water depending on downstream application). Prepare L1 medium components, L1 trace element solution and f/2 vitamin mix ahead of time.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Prepare solution 1. ASM Solution 1 by Christa Smith
Autoclave solutions 1 and 2 and let sit 24-48 hours for gas exchange.
Combine solutions 1 and 2. If a solution has some precipitate, consider filtering solution(s) before or after combining through a 0.2 micron PES membrane.
Prepare solution 2. ASM Solution 2 by Christa Smith
Add 1 mL of trace element solution. L1 Trace Element Solution by Christa Smith
Add 0.5 mL of f/2 vitamin solution. f/2 Vitamin Solution by Christa Smith
Mix well and store for up to 2 weeks at 4 Celsius. Final salt concentration is ~34 ppt.
creator: Christa Smith
